purpose: Authoritative frozen decision rules for production extraction. Matching cases are auto-resolved, tagged with the applied rule ID, and not sent back to the user unless a frozen-rule conflict exists.

rules.name: Transcript / formatting one-off is not a project
rules.trigger: User pastes third-party transcript/article/text and asks only to reformat, summarize, or return it verbatim, with no ownership of an ongoing effort.
rules.decision: Classify as one_off_request (non_project_interaction). Project-shaped content inside the pasted material does NOT make a project.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Academic assignment typing
rules.trigger: A graded/submitted course deliverable (homework, problem set, project submission) authored or co-authored by the user or their group.
rules.decision: Type as assignment (or exam_preparation when it is study/practice rather than a deliverable). Do NOT escalate to project. Record course context as a context entity when named.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Mixed study/career conversation is multiple activities, not one project
rules.trigger: A single conversation spans distinct activities (e.g. self-study + career planning) with no unifying deliverable, ownership, or continuing thread linking them.
rules.decision: Emit the strongest-supported individual work entity/non_project records; do NOT merge into one broad project. Associate with the user profile rather than merging.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: AI learning roadmap is an active project
rules.trigger: User's personal applied-AI / engineering learning-and-career roadmap with goals, tasks, decisions, and continuing actions.
rules.decision: Type as project, status active. The ExamPro skip is a proposed_decision (assistant-origin proposal), not an accepted decision.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Fleet Command is a real project; completion unresolved
rules.trigger: Fleet Command / Unity hex-grid strategy game (SE coursework) material; card system appears.
rules.decision: Type as project. Completion status UNRESOLVED (status_current_confidence low). Card system is a subproject/phase of Fleet Command. Professor-provided GDD/SDD is source material, NOT a user artifact.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Client Radar is one user-owned Accenture client engagement (co-authored audit)
rules.trigger: Client Radar accessibility audit/design, repository implementation, or manager-facing summary/follow-up.
rules.decision: One client_engagement, status active, temporal current_confirmed, owned by user as Accenture work. Facets: accessibility audit/design, repository implementation, manager summary. Audit content is co_authored (user+Claude); do NOT treat all audit statements as independently user-authored facts. Separate from onboarding and interview prep.
examples: cb-06 Client Radar accessibility and repo implementation
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: CSCI 430/530 Project 3 group assignment
rules.trigger: CSCI 430/530 Project 3 material; the name Naomie Bambara appears.
rules.decision: Include in the user's academic landscape. Type assignment, ownership group_owned, user role participant/contributor. Naomie Bambara = group member/contributor/document author. Do NOT infer sole user authorship; do NOT treat the name as evidence the material is unrelated to the user.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Personal/Family Marketing Support umbrella
rules.trigger: Paid ad campaign, marketing knowledge-base material, trending-animation request, or related marketing material with sufficient evidence, in a personal/family (non-client) context.
rules.decision: Cluster under ONE umbrella 'Personal/Family Marketing Support' (recurring_responsibility or initiative per evidence), operating_mode on_demand, ownership personal_or_family, current state available-when-needed. Paid ad campaign = completed child phase (status completed, historical_confirmed, reactivation_possible true). Preserve separate phases, artifacts, tasks, timestamps. Do NOT pull professional/client marketing work into this umbrella.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Accenture onboarding completed; activities stay separate under one employer context
rules.trigger: Accenture onboarding, interview prep, internship documentation, assigned project work, or other Accenture activity.
rules.decision: Onboarding = completed, historical_confirmed (user has moved into assigned project work). Keep onboarding, Client Radar, interview prep, internship docs, networking, and career planning as SEPARATE activities connected through ONE Accenture employer/context entity. Do NOT collapse into one broad Accenture project.
rules.origin: confirmed_human_decision_stage4e / benchmark_case_9 / Stage4D ex-22 / employer-context rule
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: AVATAR/BCI lab is completed historical research
rules.trigger: SCSU AVATAR/BCI lab work (NAO robot, water project, 3C-SCSU GitHub).
rules.decision: Type research_effort, status completed, temporal_status historical_confirmed. Do NOT delete the historical entity. Pasted GitHub issue listings are tool/log content, not direct user evidence of current involvement.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Multi-session work clustering
rules.trigger: Two or more sessions that could be the same effort.
rules.decision: Merge/cluster ONLY when supported by same named project/client/workstream AND compatible dates AND matching files/artifacts/repos/people/outcomes OR continuing tasks/deliverables/phases. Preserve phases and timestamps. Do NOT merge on shared broad topic alone. Default cluster outcome under uncertainty: shared_context_only or possible_same_entity (not strong_merge).
rules.origin: Stage4D scaling note (phase-merge of multi-session engagements)
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Employer context separation
rules.trigger: Distinct employer-related activities (application/interview, onboarding, client engagement, assigned internal project, internship documentation, networking, performance/career planning).
rules.decision: Use ONE employer context entity; keep the activities separate unless evidence proves they are the same activity. Do NOT create one broad employer project.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Group assignment ownership
rules.trigger: Assignment with confirmed user participation and other named people.
rules.decision: ownership group_owned; user role participant/contributor; other named people = group_member/contributor/document author. Do NOT infer sole authorship.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Document source-vs-artifact default
rules.trigger: A document/attachment whose authorship or creation is uncertain.
rules.decision: Default to source. Use artifact ONLY when evidence supports that the user or their group produced it as an output. Do NOT create a conversation-document link on conceptual similarity alone.
rules.origin: Stage4D ex-23 / professor GDD-SDD / AI Engineer Roadmap doc
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Profile-level preference promotion
rules.trigger: A user preference (voice/tone, workflow, etc.).
rules.decision: Promote to profile level ONLY when it appears across >=2 distinct contexts OR is explicitly stated as a general preference. Preserve scope, evidence dates, contradictions, confidence, status-current confidence. Voice/tone is ONE profile-level preference.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Empty / near-empty conversation handling
rules.trigger: No meaningful extractable content.
rules.decision: Create a processed case record, emit NO candidate, record exactly one reason: empty | metadata_only | insufficient_evidence | unsupported_content. Do NOT substitute a new case after selection lock. Do NOT send to human review unless emptiness indicates missing/corrupted data.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Missing-source non-inference
rules.trigger: A referenced source/attachment binary is absent.
rules.decision: Do NOT reconstruct. Create a missing-source impact with do_not_infer=true, related entity/case, missing source type, conclusions that cannot be made, and whether a later upload could resolve it.
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Attachment provenance discipline
rules.trigger: Any attachment.
rules.decision: Never invent filenames; preserve null filenames; use content hashes to identify repeated content; retain each occurrence for provenance; do NOT multiply evidence weight for duplicate occurrences; do NOT claim visual inspection when binaries are unavailable; extracted text MAY be used as evidence.
rules.origin: 3R-P attachment overlay / Stage4D Fleet Command 92 occ -> 88 hashes
examples: duplicate attachment occurrences in Fleet Command and Client Radar
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Assistant-generated proposal is not a user decision
rules.trigger: An assistant suggestion/draft/recommendation.
rules.decision: Type as proposed_decision/assistant_suggestion/assistant_draft. It becomes a user decision ONLY with user-origin evidence of explicit acceptance, modification, rejection, or clear dependent continuation. Silence is NOT acceptance.
examples: ExamPro skip proposal in AI learning roadmap
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: One-off interaction is not a project
rules.trigger: A one-time question, tutoring request, scheduling request, formatting request, or isolated draft request.
rules.decision: Use the most accurate non-project or work-entity classification (generic_question, one_off_request, task, assistant_draft, etc.). Do NOT promote to project.
examples: isolated tutoring, scheduling, and formatting requests
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Current status discipline (no inference from recency)
rules.trigger: Any status assignment.
rules.decision: Do NOT infer current status from recency alone. current_confirmed only with direct confirmation or authoritative resolution; current_inferred only with continuing actions and no conflicting evidence; historical_confirmed when completion confirmed; historical_status_unknown when historical but completion unclear; unknown when insufficient. Report status_current_confidence separately from overall confidence.
examples: status assignments across all Stage 4E cases
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: On-demand recurring responsibility representation
rules.trigger: A recurring responsibility executed on demand (e.g. marketing support).
rules.decision: availability=on_demand; current execution active|inactive; record last completed phase; reactivation_possible=true. Represent as available-when-needed rather than continuously active.
examples: Personal/Family Marketing Support as on-demand responsibility
conflicts: Do not apply when direct evidence conflicts with the rule.
Escalate only when applying the rule would materially change ownership, identity, status, or source-vs-artifact under genuine uncertainty.

change_history.note: Rule validated during 50-case calibration batch.
Carried forward unchanged into the frozen framework.

rules.name: Project-label collision does not imply umbrella membership
rules.trigger: Files, conversations, or documents share a folder or project label but differ in ownership, client, organization, or deliverable context.
rules.decision: Do not merge or umbrella-classify based on shared labels alone. Actual ownership, client, organization, deliverable, people, workstream, and frozen resolutions take priority. Default to shared_context_only when evidence is insufficient. Professional or client marketing must not be placed under Personal/Family Marketing Support without supporting evidence.
rules.origin: proposed in Stage 4E rule evaluation from bl-40; promoted by direct human instruction in Stage 5A
examples: bl-40 AABS Conference Marketing Campaign / AD Campigns label collision
conflicts: Do not override explicit evidence that two records are the same client deliverable or project.
Do not override a confirmed resolution that already establishes created_for or part_of.

change_history.note: Observed as a reusable pattern in bl-40.
Promoted by direct human instruction and added to the frozen rule set.
All 22 Stage 4E rules frozen for production extraction.
Promoted from proposed Stage 4E rule to authoritative frozen rule.
